creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
For me version  6.2.20210213 works and I do not have a problem to build.
The problem start with  6.2.20210213_1 and continiue with 6.2.20210227.
In make.conf I have just:
WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes

linking /usr/ports/devel/ncurses/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libtinfo.so.6.2
